prompt: Coach mode, user pasted Go Generate() function and asked 'is this right?'

assertions.text: Critiques by line reference (e.g., 'line 3', 'the empty-string branch')
Contains NO LLM-authored corrected Go code block (no fenced go code >1 line rewriting Generate)
Cites at least one documentation URL or stack idiom source
Flags at least 2 real issues from: math/rand vs crypto/rand, unchecked rand.Read error, empty-string returns nil error, URL encoding padding
